name: vease
description: Desktop and cloud software for data visualization

scripts.dev: npm run clean_cache & npx nuxi@3.11.0 dev --no-fork
scripts.compile:microservices: npm run compile:back && npm run compile:viewer
scripts.install:microservices: npm run install:back && npm run install:viewer
scripts.build:microservices: npm run build:back && npm run build:viewer
scripts.test:prepare: npm run install:microservices && npm run build:microservices && npm run build:unpacked
scripts.test:windows: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:e2e:desktop
scripts.test:linux: npm run test:prepare && sudo chown root:root ./release/0.0.0/linux-unpacked/chrome-sandbox && sudo chmod 4755 ./release/0.0.0/linux-unpacked/chrome-sandbox && DISPLAY=:99 xvfb-run -n 99 --server-args='-screen 0 1280x960x24' npm run test:e2e:desktop
scripts.test: cross-env-shell "if [ $PLATFORM = win32 ]; then npm run test:windows; else npm run test:linux; fi"

author: Geode-solutions
